message:
feat(security): add exec mediation to protocol dispatcher and 68 integration tests (SEC-4.3)

Closes the remaining gaps for bd-zh0hj:
- Add SEC-4.3 exec mediation enforcement to ExtensionDispatcher's
  protocol dispatch path (extension_dispatcher.rs), ensuring both
  JS runtime and protocol-based exec calls are mediated consistently.
- Add 68 integration tests covering dangerous command classification,
  exec mediation policy evaluation, secret broker detection/redaction,
  ledger entry accumulation, artifact export/roundtrip, and edge cases.
- Fix minor linter-suggested mul_add refactor in risk scorer test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
